title: Virtual-Yellow
description: An vanilla-like minecraft modpack focused on performance with small twerks to make the game better.
body:
# V-Yellow

**Virtual-Yellow** is a vanilla-like modpack focused on **performance** and enhancing the overall gameplay experience. It includes built-in voice chat and optional shaders. You can join vanilla servers without any issues :D It also supports controllers.

This modpack goal is to have good performance with vanilla-like feature that make the game better, you can join vanilla servers with the modpack, you also have controler support (see the docs to enable it).
this modpack is desined to make the best experiences for the players,
Contact me at ```PikminTea@proton.me``` or ```contact@yel0w.fr```
